content:
💡 openDAW | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Accessible, privacy-focused, web-based music production and education.
✨ Key Features: • Web-based Digital Audio Workstation (DAW) • Open-source (AGPL v3) • No sign-up, tracking, or ads • Focus on education and data-privacy • Community-driven development
📖 Summary: openDAW is a next-generation, open-source, web-based Digital Audio Workstation (DAW) focused on democratizing music production. It prioritizes user privacy with no sign-up, tracking, or ads, and aims to make high-quality music creation tools accessible for education and personal use.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 Hunyuan3D-2-WinPortable | Batchfile
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide an easy-to-install and run portable application for generating 3D models and textures on Windows using the Hunyuan3D models, optimized for hardware with limited VRAM.
✨ Key Features: • Portable package for Hunyuan3D 2.0/2.1 on Windows • Optimized for consumer-grade GPUs (via mmgp integration) • Support for specific CUDA versions (12.9 and 12.6) • Reduced VRAM/RAM requirements through model offloading • Optional Developer Mode for efficient model storage
📖 Summary: This repository provides a portable package for running Hunyuan3D 2.0 and 2.1 on Windows. It integrates optimizations for consumer-grade GPUs and offers versions compatible with specific CUDA versions, simplifying the setup for 3D generation tasks.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 dwm-status-bar | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users of minimalist window managers with a consolidated, real-time information display on their root window, reducing the need for separate applications or widgets.
✨ Key Features: • Displays weather information from OpenWeatherMap • Shows network upload/download speed using ifstat • Fetches Moscow Exchange (IMOEX) index data • Monitors Claude Code API usage limits
📖 Summary: This repository provides a minimalist status bar for window managers like dwm and dwl. It aggregates various real-time information such as weather, currency exchange rates, stock market indices, API usage limits, network speed, system resource usage (RAM, CPU), battery status, and the current date/time into a single, concise string displayed on the root window.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 Vision-Agents | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling developers to quickly build and deploy low-latency, intelligent video experiences that can watch, listen, and understand video content in real-time.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time video AI processing • Low-latency audio/video streaming (<30ms) • Integration with LLMs (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude) • Pluggable video processing pipeline (YOLO, Roboflow, custom models)
📖 Summary: Vision Agents is a Python library for building real-time, multi-modal AI agents that can process video, audio, and text. It leverages Stream's edge network for low-latency communication and integrates with various AI models (like OpenAI, Gemini, Claude) and computer vision tools (like YOLO, Roboflow).
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 InvoicePlane | PHP
🎯 Primary Use Case: Managing invoices, clients, and payments for businesses.
✨ Key Features: • Invoice and quote management • Client management • Payment tracking • PHP 8.2+ compatibility • Enhanced security (XSS, LFI, log poisoning fixes)
📖 Summary: InvoicePlane is a self-hosted, open-source web application for managing invoices, clients, and payments. It offers robust features for creating and tracking financial documents, with a recent update enhancing PHP compatibility and security.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 pi-mono | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Developing and deploying AI agents and AI-powered applications.
✨ Key Features: • Unified multi-provider LLM API (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.) • Agent runtime with tool calling and state management • Interactive coding agent CLI • Terminal UI library with differential rendering • Web components for AI chat interfaces
📖 Summary: The pi-mono repository provides a comprehensive toolkit for building AI agents, offering a unified LLM API, an agent runtime, a coding agent CLI, and libraries for TUI and web UIs. It aims to simplify the development and deployment of AI-powered applications and agents.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
